introSection: Spook Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Joyland Childrens Fun Park in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK. It was built by W.G.H. Transportation Engineering and opened in 1998.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are restrained by a single lap bar for each row.

fullText:
Spook Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Joyland Childrens Fun Park in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK. It was built by W.G.H. Transportation Engineering and opened in 1998.



Red track and supports.

Riders are restrained by a single lap bar for each row.
